page.title: Template:Country data Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha

revision.comment: mass revert of [[WP:BANREVERT|block-evading edits]] by TheCurrencyGuy/CorwenAv. Any editor in good standing is welcome to restore this edit if they find it constructive.
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23368769069|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Saint_Helena%2C_Ascension_and_Tristan_da_Cunha here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Saint_Helena%2C_Ascension_and_Tristan_da_Cunha for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}}
| alias = Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
| flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg
| altlink = {{{altlink|}}}
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
<noinclude>
| redir1 = SHN
| related1 = Saint Helena
| related2 = Ascension Island
| related3 = Tristan da Cunha
| related4 = Saint Helena and Dependencies <!-- Former entity -->
</noinclude>
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24919637890|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Saint_Helena%2C_Ascension_and_Tristan_da_Cunha for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}}
| alias = Saint Helena, Ascension and Tristan da Cunha
| flag alias = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg
| altlink = {{{altlink|}}}
| size = {{{size|}}}
| name = {{{name|}}}
<noinclude>
| redir1 = SHN
| related1 = Saint Helena
| related2 = Ascension Island
| related3 = Tristan da Cunha
| related4 = Saint Helena and Dependencies 
</noinclude>
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
